ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division or conference of the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 2022-2023) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the season */,
  "top_scorer_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top goal scorer in the season */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the season's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_top_scorer_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_scorer_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, draw, loss) */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the match */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the match's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the standing belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position of the team in the league table */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference of the team */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the team */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (matches without conceding a goal) */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team */,
  "penalties_missed" INTEGER /* Number of penalties missed by the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., forward, midfielder, defender) */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the match */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player in the match */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player in the match */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents by the player in the match */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's statistics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is played */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the league was founded */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "current_champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current champion team */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the league's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leagues_current_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
